{{Infobox concept
| name = Vessel
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Vessel Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A Vessel is an [[Awakened object]] that serves as a source of power for individuals known as [[Soulbound]]. These objects, which can range from small items like earrings or knives to massive ships, are connected to their users through a deep personal bond and the investment of specific [[Intent]]. This connection allows [[Soulbound]] individuals to harness the abilities of powerful entities such as [[Elders]] or Kameiras. While many [[Vessels]] are small and unobtrusive, some are entire ships used by [[Navigators]] to traverse the [[Aion Sea]]. These specialized vessels are often constructed from seamless, fused wood and may incorporate parts of an [[Elder]] to function. A Vessel possesses its own form of consciousness, though it does not communicate through human speech. Instead, it expresses itself via impulses, impressions, or a sense of purpose that can feel like a second mind to its user. This connection is so profound that damage to a Vessel can physically affect the [[Soulbound]] person, and an [[Awakened]] ship may even attempt to influence its captain's actions. Because [[Vessels]] are central to a [[Soulbound]]'s strength, they are primary targets in combat; if a Vessel is destroyed or seized, the user's power is compromised. While most individuals possess a single Vessel, some rare cases involve multiple objects, which can lead to unpredictable interactions between the different wills.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A Vessel serves as a sealable source of power that [[Jyrine]] seeks to have returned to her. These objects are bonded to a [[Soulbound]], making it vital to identify which Vessel belongs to a specific individual as quickly as possible. If brought back to their respective Vessel, a [[Soulbound]] gains the ability to fight their way to freedom. While [[Calder]]'s Vessel is officially classified as property of the [[Aurelian Empire]], [[Jerri]] expresses a desire for her own Vessel to provide her with protection.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Vessel]] is a source of power that can be sealed.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jyrine]] possesses a [[Vessel]] that she wishes to have returned.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Soulbound]] bonds a [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|It is critical to identify a [[Soulbound]]'s [[Vessel]] quickly.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Soulbound]] can fight their way free if they are brought to their [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]]'s [[Vessel]] is considered property of the [[Aurelian Empire]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] wishes she had her [[Vessel]] to protect herself.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Vessel]] is an [[Awakened object]] that provides [[Soulbound]] with the abilities of an [[Elder]] or a [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Vessel]] is a device containing [[silver mist]] that once raised [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|During [[Meia]]'s leap, [[Calder]] experiences a physical sensation as his Vessel tenses. This entity serves as the source of [[Jerri]]'s power, which is delivered to her through [[Kelarac]]. The Vessel possesses the ability to transfer power from an object directly into a person's body and can enter a state of rage with the desire to incinerate objects. Additionally, [[Baldesar Kern]] has been known to utilize his own Vessel.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] feels his [[Vessel]] tense during [[Meia]]'s leap.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Vessel]]'s power can flow from an object into a person's body.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Vessel]] is the source of [[Jerri]]'s power, delivered to her by [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Vessel]] can rage and want to incinerate things.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Baldesar Kern]] mentions using his [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The power of a [[Vessel]] allowed [[Shera]] to know the attacker's position.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A [[Vessel]] can harness [[Elder power]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A [[Vessel]] is usually a weapon passed down through a [[Guild]]'s history.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] holds up her new [[Vessel]], which she thinks should be called [[Bastion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Varia Selethir]] is bound to a [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Champions]] carry devices that could be their [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Vessel]] is a component of a [[Soulbound]]'s power.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Vessels]] can be sealed using specific boxes.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|If a [[Soulbound]] becomes their [[Vessels]]' [[Vessel]], they will be nothing more than the boots that carry them.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] overused her [[Vessel]] too quickly.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Each [[Vessel]] is like an impossible weight.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"They’ll have your Vessel sealed," a voice called from down the hall.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
